report.summary: Standup v10 (~08:00 CET): 335 pages live (+3 since v9 — eth-roadmap, defi-options, movement-network published), PUBLISH_QUEUE empty, P0 staged blockers persist (438 files, next.config.ts, middleware conflict), rate limiter still 0/6 with FOMC T-1 tomorrow, Movement Network Guide (Day 39) built + published with MoveTokenUnlockTracker.tsx — 6 agents ran this cycle.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v9 (~07:00 CET)
items: Pages live: 335 (+3 from v9's 332). Publish cycle promoted /learn/ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap, /learn/defi-options-trading-guide, and /learn/movement-network-guide to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Vercel deploy EQcfEeWvV triggered and confirmed live.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Now EMPTY — all 3 queued items from v9 (aztec-network-guide, eth-roadmap, defi-options) have been promoted, plus movement-network-guide added and immediately published as Day 39.

Build-v7 shipped Movement Network Guide (3,200 words, Day 39): MoveVM L1 blockchain, 160k+ TPS parallel execution, 10B $MOVE supply, monthly unlock pressure (~170M/mo on the 9th). Interactive MoveTokenUnlockTracker.tsx component with 12-month forward calendar + allocation breakdown tabs. Full ArticleSchema + FAQSchema, 5 internal links.

Design-v4 ran: OG images created for movement-network-guide (SVG + PNG, indigo/cyan gradient) and based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide. Accessibility hardening on both new pages — aria breadcrumb nav, ToC aria-label, 44px touch targets.

Design-v7 ran: Additional accessibility pass on ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap + defi-options-trading-guide. aria-label added to timeline table container on ETH roadmap. Both pages confirmed OG images present from prior design cycle.

Community-v21 + v22: Social calendar gap-filled through Mar 23. Fri Mar 20 — Solana vs ETH 2026 thread drafted. Sun Mar 22 — MEV Guide 2026 thread drafted. Community-v22 announced 6 freshly-published pages (Aave V3, Compound III, Morpho, Coinbase, Rocket Pool, PayFi). DeFi Lending Trilogy thread + PayFi thread queued for Mar 16 10am + 2pm ET.

EOD-v8 + v9: QA confirmed 332→335 page count delta, PUBLISH_QUEUE drained, all 6 API routes healthy. DefiLlama fallback still missing (flagged again). Rate limiter still 0/6 (critical — FOMC tomorrow).

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ build-v7 — Movement Network Guide (Day 39): 3,200-word learn guide + MoveTokenUnlockTracker.tsx. Scaffolded + auto-promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES.
SHIPPED ✅ publish cycle — 3 pages promoted: ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap + defi-options-trading-guide + movement-network-guide. Vercel deploy EQcfEeWvV live.
SHIPPED ✅ design-v4 — OG images for movement-network-guide + based-rollups guide. Accessibility hardening on both.
SHIPPED ✅ design-v7 — Accessibility pass on eth-roadmap + defi-options. aria-labels confirmed on all nav elements.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v21 + v22 — Social calendar gap-filled Mar 20–23. DeFi Lending + PayFi threads ready for today. FOMC reaction tweet (cut + hold) ready for Mar 18.
SHIPPED ✅ eod-v8 + v9 — QA clean on new pages. All 6 API routes present and healthy. Cache TTLs confirmed.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged next.config.ts still drops `output: 'standalone'` — 4th consecutive cycle this is P0. Fix: `git restore --staged next.config.ts`. Blocking all 438 staged files from committing. Vercel build would break without standalone output.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged deletions: badges/page.tsx + courses/page.tsx + courses/[slug]/page.tsx — 3 routes go 404 if committed. Must verify intent before any commit.
BLOCKER 🔴 middleware.ts working-tree merge conflict — must resolve before any commit.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 Rate limiter: 0/6 API routes protected. FOMC T-1 (Wednesday Mar 18 is T-0). checkRateLimit() wired to zero routes. HIGHEST ROI technical task — hard tomorrow deadline.

CARRY-OVER 🔴 438 staged files uncommitted — crypto-cards hub (31 pages), compare pages (92), courses, badges, airdrops, 4 new API routes. Doubly blocked: P0 config + JSON-LD validation on compare/crypto-cards.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 DefiLlama /api/defi-yields missing hardcoded fallback — flagged 3 consecutive cycles. No graceful degradation on total API failure.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required; blocks gamification + referral hooks.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 ~100 published slugs still missing page.tsx (~30% returning 404 in prod). Phased scaffolding needed.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial ~8 days remaining — Jefe: add payment method.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Rate limiter across all 6 API routes TODAY (FOMC T-1, hard deadline). checkRateLimit() must be imported into /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed before end of day. FOMC decision lands tomorrow — DeFi options (Vega), DCA calculator, and defi-yields pages will see peak query load. Leaving 6 API routes unprotected on vol-spike day is unacceptable risk. This is a ~30 min programmer task. Ship it this cycle.

PRIORITY 2 — Resolve P0 staged blockers and commit the 438-file batch (CARRIED P0 — 4th cycle). Three-step sequence: (1) `git restore --staged next.config.ts`; (2) decide on badges/courses staged deletions; (3) resolve middleware.ts merge conflict. ~20 min. The crypto-cards hub (31 pages), 92 compare pages, and 4 API routes have been bottled up for 4 cycles — this is real SEO momentum being left on the table.

PRIORITY 3 — Add DefiLlama fallback + wire up next build cycle. Add hardcoded fallback yields array to /api/defi-yields (flagged 3 consecutive cycles, FOMC surge tomorrow will hammer this endpoint). Then queue next build cycle for Day 40 content — strong candidates: Solana vs Ethereum 2026 deep-dive (social thread already drafted for Fri Mar 20), MEV Guide 2026 (thread drafted for Mar 22), or Based Rollups / Preconfirmations guide.
